content: When handling documents in a mobile browser, users can be offered (or not) the choice of opening the file in a browser or in the mobile app.

comment.text: When users are configuring deep linking options for mobile documents, this translation key is used to provide a brief explanation of how the file can be opened in either a browser or the mobile app. It appears alongside a radio button group and a mobile category wrapper in the Portal Settings customization page.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase '(or not)' from the English source is missing in the Arabic translation, which changes the nuance of the setting's optionality.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: عند التعامل مع المستندات في متصفح الجوال، يمكن للمستخدمين أن يُعرض عليهم (أو لا) خيار فتح الملف في المتصفح أو في التطبيق.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: English ends with "." but translation ends with ")"
The Azerbaijani translation uses 'təqdim edərkən' (while presenting/offering), which changes the meaning from 'handling documents' (managing/working with documents) to 'presenting documents'.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Mobil brauzerdə sənədlərlə işləyərkən istifadəçilərə faylı brauzerdə və ya mobil proqramda açmaq imkanı verilə bilər (ya da verilməyə bilər)

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'ສະເີ' (sae) is an incomplete/broken word. It appears to be a typo for 'ສະເໜີ' (sa-noe), which means 'to offer'. As it stands, 'ສະເີ' has no meaning in Lao.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ເມື່ອຈັດການເອກະສານໃນບຣາວເຊີມືຖື, ຜູ້ໃຊ້ສາມາດສະເໜີ (ຫຼື ບໍ່) ໃຫ້ເລືອກເປີດໄຟລ໌ໃນບຣາວເຊີ ຫຼື ໃນແອັບມືຖື.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The subject of the sentence is incorrect. The English says 'users can be offered', but the Romanian says 'utilizatorilor le va oferi' (it will offer to users), which lacks a clear subject and implies the system/action will offer it, but the grammatical structure is awkward and shifts the agency incorrectly compared to the passive/conditional English sense.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Când se gestionează documente într-un browser de pe dispozitivul mobil, utilizatorilor le poate fi oferită (sau nu) opțiunea de a deschide fișierul într-un browser sau în aplicația mobilă.

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The phrase '(හෝ නොකර)' is a literal and incorrect translation of '(or not)'. In Sinhala, this translates to '(or not doing)', which makes the sentence nonsensical. It should convey the idea of the option being optional or not being offered.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: ජංගම බ්‍රවුසරයකින් ලේඛන හැසිරවීමේදී, පරිශීලකයින්ට ගොනුව බ්‍රවුසරයක හෝ ජංගම යෙදුමක විවෘත කිරීමට තේරීම ලබා දිය හැකිය (හෝ ලබා නොදිය හැකිය).

ai_spell_check_issues.description: The word 'file' is incomplete in the Vietnamese translation ('tập' instead of 'tập tin' or 'tệp'), which makes the sentence grammatically incomplete and potentially confusing.
ai_spell_check_issues.suggestion: Khi xử lý tài liệu trong trình duyệt di động, người dùng có thể được cung cấp (hoặc không) lựa chọn mở tệp trong trình duyệt hoặc trong ứng dụng di động.
